mapper.sql:
/* wms-outbound-ObReport-sql-oracle.xml - selectClassMidReportSql - - 중분류 통계 조회 SQL */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT '0' AS CHK , WIFWA.CTKEY AS CTKEY , WIFWA.OWKEY AS OWKEY , WA.WAHDDAY AS WAHDDAY /*웨이브작업일자*/ , WA.WAHDKEY , WIFIC.UPDATEDATE AS UPDATEDATE /*작업일시*/ , WA.WARND AS WARND /*차수*/ , WIFIC.ICKEY AS ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , WIFIC.ICNM AS ICNM /*상품명*/ , WIFIC.QTY AS CNFRMQTY /*처리수량*/ , STN.STNDIVCD AS STNDIVCD /*구분파레트렉*/ , STN.STNNO AS STNNO /*중분류 STN*/ , CELL.CELLNO AS CELLNO /*셀*/ , WIFOR.DASCELLBRCD AS DASCELLBRCD /*셀바코드*/ , WIFIC.EMPNOBRCD AS EMPNOBRCD /*작업자*/ FROM TWIF_DAS_PRCSRSLT_WA WIFWA INNER JOIN TWIF_DAS_PRCSRSLT_ORDER WIFOR ON WIFWA.CTKEY = WIFOR.CTKEY AND WIFWA.OWKEY = WIFOR.OWKEY AND WIFWA.WASEQ = WIFOR.WASEQ INNER JOIN TWIF_DAS_PRCSRSLT_IC WIFIC ON WIFWA.CTKEY = WIFIC.CTKEY AND WIFWA.OWKEY = WIFIC.OWKEY AND WIFOR.WASEQ = WIFIC.WASEQ AND WIFOR.ORDERSEQ = WIFIC.ORDERSEQ INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL CELL ON CELL.CTKEY = WIFIC.CTKEY AND CELL.CELLBARCODE = WIFOR.DASCELLBRCD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WA ON WA.CTKEY = WA.CTKEY AND WA.OWKEY = WA.OWKEY AND WA.WAHDKEY = WIFWA.WAHDKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_STN STN ON STN.CTKEY = WIFIC.CTKEY AND STN.STNBARCODE = CELL.STNBARCODE LEFT JOIN TWIF_DAS_CLASSIFTOTE_MAPP_ORDER MAPP ON MAPP.CTKEY = WIFIC.CTKEY AND MAPP.OWKEY = WIFIC.OWKEY AND MAPP.WASEQ = WIFIC.WASEQ AND MAPP.ORDERSEQ = WIFIC.ORDERSEQ AND MAPP.DASCELLBRCD = WIFOR.DASCELLBRCD WHERE WIFWA.DASDIV = '2' /*중분류*/ AND WIFWA.IFSTATUS = '90' /*완료건만*/ ORDER BY WA.INSERTDATE DESC , WIFIC.INSERTDATE DESC , WA.WARND ASC ) WHERE 1=1
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
